description: Criterion type contract for Population Simulation - maps criterion types to simulation features

types.description: Activity text field - free-form text input for schedule event activity description
Schedule event ordering - events ordered chronologically by time
Coordinate inputs X/Y - numerical values 0-10000 for location positions

rules.description: Activity text (note) is descriptive only, does not affect simulation scoring
Schedule events have explicit time ordering, auto-sorted chronologically
Coordinate values are distinct per location; no range overlap required by design
